workout.label: Started, cut short
workout.detail: Left bicep cramped during goblet squat. Switch to bodyweight or lighter front-loaded work.

foods: Lunch: grilled chicken salad, ranch, croutons, cheese, avocado
Dinner: cheese sandwich (bread, cheese, mayo) — ~380 cal

sleep.label: Short night
sleep.detail: Stayed up too late last night.

slip: You started the workout, but the goblet squat set off your left bicep.
adjustment: Do not force the goblet hold. Switch to pain-free lower-body work or stop if the bicep keeps cramping.
next: Use bodyweight squats, split squats, or a lighter hold only if the arm feels normal.
